mapper.select:
select c.*,e.name masterName from clazz c left join emp e on c.master_id=e.id
c.name like concat('%',#{name},'%')
and c.create_time between #{begin} and #{end}
order by c.update_time desc
select c.*,e.name masterName from clazz c left join emp e on c.master_id=e.id where c.id=#{id}
select c.name as pos,count(s.id) as num from clazz c left join student s on c.id=s.clazz_id group by c.id order by num;
